title: Pixel Font (chinese)
body:
## Chinese font Refreshed
This Resource Pack uses the true pixel font ‘**Cubic 11**’ for displaying Chinese characters, ‘**Compact Font**’ for displaying Eenglish characters.
Perfectly matches the vanilla typeface (aka 'Minecraft Seven') style, enhances the consistency of the in-game text display, and improves the gaming experience.

這個資源包使用了俐方體「**Cubic 11**」顯示中文字元 **[支援繁體中文]**，
「**Compact Font**」顯示英文字元
它與原版字體（即「Minecraft Seven」）風格完美契合，提升遊戲內文字顯示的一致性，進而改善整體遊戲體驗。

![Main screen preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80be4ce7d2560ab7a8526d59c25dd471384dd612.jpeg)

## Credit
- [Cubic 11](https://github.com/ACh-K/Cubic-11) by ACh-K.
- [Compact Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compact-font) by Kaiji-Kun.
